item.text: I’m handling this as a single PowerShell write in the run directory so the note content and execution CWD are exact and nothing outside that folder is touched.

item.command:
"C:\\windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command '$lines = @(
  '"'PASS'
  'The remote MindChuk bridge and runner path worked.'
  ('CWD: ' + (Get-Location).Path)
)
Set-Content -LiteralPath 'success-note.md' -Value "'$lines'

"C:\\windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command '$lines = @(
  '"'PASS'
  'The remote MindChuk bridge and runner path worked.'
  ('CWD: ' + (Get-Location).Path)
)
Set-Content -LiteralPath 'success-note.md' -Value "'$lines'
